zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Stratton於1348年出生在英國素福爾可紹特利時，他的父親John Walter Stratton29歲，母親Isabel Loudham24歲。他於1373年與Cecily Walter在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可紹特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Stratton于1348年出生在英国素福爾可紹特利时，他的父亲John Walter Stratton29岁，母亲Isabel Loudham24岁。他于1373年与Cecily Walter在英国英格兰諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可紹特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Stratton was born in 1348, in Shotley, Suffolk, England, his father, John Walter Stratton, was 29 and his mother, Isabel Loudham, was 24. He married Cecily Walter in 1373, in Long Stratton St Mary, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1392, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Shotley, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Stratton est né en 1348, à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Walter Stratton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabel Loudham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Walter en 1373, à Long Stratton St Mary, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1392, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Shotley, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Stratton 1348 in Shotley, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Walter Stratton 29 und seine Mutter Isabel Loudham 24. Er hat 1373 in Long Stratton St Mary, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Cecily Walter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Shotley, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Stratton è nato il nel 1348 nel Shotley, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Walter Stratton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Loudham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Walter nel 1373, nel Long Stratton St Mary, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1392, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Shotley, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Strattonが1348年にイギリススフォルクショトリーで生まれた時，父John Walter Strattonは29歳，母Isabel Loudhamは24歳であった。1373年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオン スト マリーでCecily Walterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクショトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Stratton Kyrketon, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Stratton(이)가 1348년 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Walter Stratton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Loudham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴 스트 메리에서 Cecily Walter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 쇼틀리에 묻혔다.

ru.Stratton Kyrketon, Norfolk, England: лонг страттон ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Stratton родился в 1348 г. в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Walter Stratton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Loudham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Walter в 1373 г. в местности лонг страттон ст мэри, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1392 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности шотли, суффолк, Англия.
